---
title: "nitrix.stats.inference.cluster"
generated: true
signature-hash: 11c00af41870b927
description: "Cluster maps for threshold-based enhancement and inference."
listing:
  id: nitrix-stats-inference-cluster-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-stats-inference-cluster/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.inference.cluster`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Cluster maps for threshold-based enhancement and inference.

Given a statistic image and a height threshold, the supra-threshold voxels
form spatial clusters (via `connected_components`).
[`cluster_size_map`](nitrix-stats-inference-cluster/cluster_size_map.qmd) labels every voxel with the *size* (voxel count) of
its cluster; [`cluster_mass_map`](nitrix-stats-inference-cluster/cluster_mass_map.qmd) with the integrated supra-threshold
statistic of its cluster.  These are the per-threshold ingredients of
threshold-free cluster enhancement (`tfce`) and the cluster-extent /
cluster-mass thresholding modes of the `randomise` permutation driver.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-stats-inference-cluster-symbols}
:::
